settings.heading: Repair Old or Torn Insulation — Without Tearing It Out
settings.image_alt: BlueTex TermBar cover system installed over old metal building insulation — before and after.
settings.media_caption: BlueTex goes directly over the old insulation. Mechanically attached at the purlins with aluminum TermBars.

settings.image_alt: Retrofit insulation for an existing metal building interior
settings.title: Retrofit Existing Metal Buildings
settings.text: The smart insulation choice for metal buildings you don't heat and cool 24/7 — garages, workshops, ag buildings. BlueTex delivers exactly what these buildings need at a fraction of the spray foam cost.

settings.image_alt: Insulated roll-up garage door — before and after temperature impact
settings.title: Insulate Roll-Up Doors
settings.text: A simple DIY upgrade for hot metal roll-up doors. Pre-cut kits sized to your door — straightforward install, real summer heat reduction.

settings.eyebrow: Two More Ways BlueTex Solves Metal Building Problems
settings.heading: Existing Buildings & Roll-Up Doors
settings.text: Two high-volume product lines for the most common projects we see. Pick the one that matches your building.
